title: dianthus atlanticus
intro: Dianthus atlanticus, also known as the Atlantic pink or pink rockrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dianthus atlanticus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Dianthus atlanticus can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
